creator: erwan@rail.eu.org
text:
While upgrading djvulibre port, I get following error

c++ -o bin2cpp -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I../.. -I../../libdjvu -I. -DNDEBUG -Wall -Wno-non-virtual-dtor -I/usr/local/include -D_THREAD_SAFE -DTHREADMODEL=POSIXTHREADS -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -D_GETOPT_H -I/usr/local/include -O -pipe bin2cpp.o -pthread -Wl,-export-dynamic  -ldjvulibre -L/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libiconv.so -lm /usr/local/lib/libjpeg.so -Wl,--rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib -Wl,--rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib
/usr/bin/ld: cannot find -ldjvulibre
*** Error code 1

How-To-Repeat: portupgrade djvulibre, to  djvulibre-3.5.21_1
